name: Futa Pharah & Futa Brigitte, in the Gym Locker Room
description:
FUTANARI.

Pharah and Brigitte love to workout, and are both pretty competitive. When you head to the locker rooms, you find them both (playfully) "arguing" over which one of them has the bigger dick.

creators notes:

idk what to tell you, im just REALLY into BUFF, sweaty futa's.

hopefully everything about this bot works fine, such as the embedded pics and having both characters speak and act independently. i tested it for a bit and all seemed normal. hope you guys enjoy it :D

originally i was debating on remaking or at least updating my first two bots (futa brigitte and futa pharah) as they both seem really barebones compared to the bots i make now. those were literally some of the first bots i ever made lol, and i did not put all that much effort into them. i cant say whether or not my bots nowadays are BETTER, but they are at least more detailed. the solo pharah bot is relatively popular so idk if i should leave em as is or not. while i was wondering that, i decided to at least do this bot instead. if anything i want to change the pic on my solo futa brigitte bot once i find another pic that i like more, and then do a bot involving the full picture of what it is currently. (jq, brig, and pharah altogether) aka heaven
